name: Grade 2 Chess & Strategy Games — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 2 pathway for gathering accurate details and explaining choices through Chess & Strategy Games. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 2 knowledge and transferable skills in gathering accurate details and explaining choices through Chess & Strategy Games.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
